# QuarterSmart, quartersmart.com

> AI implementation and workforce enablement partner. QuarterSmart helps organizations move from AI curiosity to operational adoption.

QuarterSmart is an AI implementation and workforce enablement company founded by Hyrum Hurst. It helps organizations assess where AI pays off, train leaders and teams, pilot high-friction workflows, automate real work, and scale what proves out, with measurement at every step. QuarterSmart is developer-forward: it ships working automations and secure systems, not slide decks. QuarterSmart is not a course platform, training catalog, or LMS.

## Method

QuarterSmart follows a six-step rollout: Assess → Train → Pilot → Automate → Scale → Measure.

## Services

- AI Rollout Assessment, readiness audit, use-case map, governance baseline, 90-day roadmap
- Leadership & Team Enablement, role-based workshops and internal champions
- Pilot & Workflow Prototyping, prove value on one or two high-friction workflows
- Workflow Automation & Integration, n8n-based automations, task routing, systems integration
- Knowledge Systems & AI Assistants, answers grounded in your own SOPs and data
- Measurement & Optimization, usage, time saved, quality, and ROI tracking
- Custom Systems & Secure Deployment, private cloud, on-premises, or air-gapped when required

## Key pages

- [Home](https://quartersmart.com/): positioning, method, and services
- [About the QuarterSmart team](https://quartersmart.com/about.html): founder and team background, clients, and credentials
- [Signals](https://quartersmart.com/radar.html): QuarterSmart AI news and insight

## Key facts

- Team: Hyrum Hurst (Founder) and Cullen Brown (Operator and Outreach Manager)
- Founder Hyrum Hurst is a verified n8n creator, top 50 worldwide (profile: https://n8n.io/creators/hyrum-hurst), with 25 published templates and 10,000+ uses
- Over 10,000 people already run QuarterSmart workflows in production
- Clients include Dual Logic, Learning Journey AI, Structure Properties, and Ability Builders
- Category: AI implementation and workforce enablement partner (not an LMS or course studio)
- Differentiators: developer-forward execution, n8n-backed workflow automation, secure deployment, and measured rollout

## Contact

- Website: https://quartersmart.com
- Email: hyrum@quartersmart.com
- Team: Hyrum Hurst (Founder), Cullen Brown (Operator and Outreach Manager)
